---
title: "SAPIC"
---

SAPIC is a Particle-in-cell code for plasma physics simulations. It is designed to be fast, efficient, and easy to use, making it an ideal choice for researchers and students.

::: {#bcc669ee .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
x = 1
y = 2
z = x + y
print(z)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```
3
```
:::
:::


::: {.callout-note}
# Welcome to SAPIC!
Fast, efficient Particle-in-cell code for plasma physics simulations.
:::
